steps.title: Use the legitimacy context
steps.content: The sentence says a monarch lacking necessary characteristics of legitimacy would be forced to do something with the throne. The blank must mean give up or relinquish power.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated meanings
steps.content: A means return in kind, B means add notes, and D means make equal. None fits losing a throne. The word meaning give up matches the sentence. The answer is C.
